issue: I notice that people I assigned the test in October of 2025 have not received new tests. How long do the tests stay active in the system.
subject: Test Active in the system
response: According to the documentation, the test expiration time can be modified by the test creator. The time frame for the test is marked by the start login date/time and end login date/time. The test URL remains active within this time frame, and candidates can only attempt the test between the start and end times. To modify the test expiration time, please follow the steps in the documentation: [Modify Test Expiration Time Prerequisite Modifying test expiration time](https://support.hackerrank.com/articles/2979262079-modify-test-expiration-time).

issue:
I'm noticing that you all have many default versions of roles. (e.g. front end developer for react, angular, vue.js, etc.) What do you consider best practice 
for when to create a new test versus create a variant of the test? What are the advantages and disadvantages of using variants?
subject:
When should I create a variant versus
 have a different test?
response: To determine when to create a new test versus create a variant of the test, consider using test variants to personalize the evaluation based on roles, skills, or other criteria. You can design multiple variants within the same assessment to adapt to different candidate profiles. To create test variants, follow the steps in the 'Create Test Variants' section of the documentation.

issue:
Hi there

We have sent a candidate a Hackerrank assessment already, but we have been informed that they require extra time. As the assessment is 105 minutes, they need an extra 50% extra time added (so around 53 minutes) in addition.

Please can you provide step-by-step instruction on how we are to reinvite them.

Do we find their profile in 'Candidates' , put in Add time 53 minutes and then click 'reinvite' and send the email? The email to the candidate says 105 minutes as the duration though still so not sure how we can check?

Thanks
subject:
How to reinvite candidate to Hackerrank 
assessment and add extra time
response: To add extra time for a candidate, log in to your HackerRank for Work account, go to the Tests tab, select the test you want to modify, go to the Candidates tab, select the checkbox next to the candidate(s), click More > Add Time, enter the time in minutes, and click Confirm. Note that a candidate who is still in a test session must refresh the page to see the updated timer, and a candidate who has completed the test must log in again to view the added time.

issue:
One of my claude conversations has some private info, i forgot to make a temporary chat, is there anything
 else that can be done? like delete etc?
response: Your Claude conversations remain private, and Anthropic doesn't send them to helplines. If you're concerned about a private conversation, you can reach out to the support center at [support.anthropic.com](https://support.anthropic.com) for assistance.
